title: Surgeon Vacancy at Dr Lal PathLabs International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Dr Lal PathLabs International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Dr Lal PathLabs International Enterprises has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Ludhiana office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Dr Lal PathLabs International Enterprises:
Dr Lal PathLabs International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in NABH Standards

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dr Lal PathLabs International Enterprises!
